summary: Settlement integration with credit notes and factory returns tested successfully. All 9 features verified: (1) Settlement creation with deliveries + credit notes + factory returns, (2) Settlement succeeds with ONLY factory returns, (3) Settlement stores credit_note_ids and factory_return_ids arrays, (4) Settlement includes total_credit_notes_issued and total_factory_return_credit, (5) Settlement rejects when no data exists, (6) Monthly reconciliation returns total_factory_return_credit, (7) BillingTab shows 7 summary cards including ③ Factory Returns, (8) Net Payout formula = Earnings - ① + ② + ③, (9) Per-account detail table has ③ Factory Returns column.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Settlement integration with credit notes and factory returns is working. The create_settlement endpoint (POST /api/distributors/{id}/settlements) now: (1) Fetches credit_notes from credit_notes collection independently, (2) Fetches factory returns with requires_settlement=true OR source=warehouse, (3) Stores credit_note_ids and factory_return_ids arrays, (4) Includes total_credit_notes_issued and total_factory_return_credit in response. Monthly reconciliation endpoint returns total_factory_return_credit field. BillingTab shows 7 summary cards with Net Payout = Earnings - ① + ② + ③.

verified: Settlement creation with deliveries + credit notes + factory returns
Settlement creation succeeds with ONLY factory returns (no deliveries)
Settlement stores credit_note_ids and factory_return_ids arrays
Settlement rejects when no deliveries, credit notes, or factory returns
Shows factory return credit per account
Net Payout calculation includes factory return credit
